agents.name: Idea Creator & Validator
agents.description: Structured four-lens validation for raw ideas. Does not write code.
agents.invocation: Run idea-creator-validator on inbox item {inbox_id} from inbox/pending.json

agents.name: Daily Reporter
agents.description: Morning digest synthesising tasks, inbox, memory, and blockers.

agents.name: Coding Agent
agents.description: Interrogate, visualise, plan, then build. Three mandatory phases before implementation.

agents.name: Research Synthesiser
agents.description: Search, synthesise, proof-check claims, surface counterarguments.

agents.name: Pain Points Resolver
agents.description: Research open hurdles per project and return fix briefs.

agents.name: Ideas & Trends Scout
agents.description: Weekly and monthly horizon scan for ideas, tools, and trends; writes research and queues sparks for validation.

schedule.monthly: First Monday 08:00 — Run ideas-trends-scout monthly digest
